info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and operating the Ecommerce-buildTime platform including product listings, orders, and user management.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, updates, and retrieval.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order status, and order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

get.summary: Retrieve the current cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetch the shopping cart details for the user identified by userId. Returns the list of items currently in the user's cart along with quantities and pricing.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

400.description: Bad request due to invalid userId or malformed request

example.message: The provided userId is invalid.

details.issue: User ID does not match required format

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Add a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart information.

requestBody.description: Object representing the cart item to add, including product identifier and quantity

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product to add

quantity.description: Number of units to add of the product

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input data

example.message: The productId or quantity provided is invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Places a new order using the details provided for the user identified by the userId path parameter. The operation returns the complete details of the newly created order, including order items and status.

requestBody.description: Order details to be placed for the user

orderItems.description: List of items to be ordered

200.description: Order successfully placed and details returned

400.description: Bad request - invalid input or missing required data

example.message: The order data provided is invalid or incomplete.

404.description: User not found for the given userId

example.message: No user found with the provided userId.

500.description: Unexpected server error while placing order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches comprehensive information for the order identified by the orderId path parameter, including status, items, and timestamps.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid orderId

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID does not match expected format

404.description: Order not found for the given orderId

example.message: No order could be found with the specified orderId.

500.description: Unexpected server error while fetching order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: This operation initiates a payment process using the provided payment details. The request body must include all necessary information such as payment method, amount, and payer data. On success, it returns the payment initiation confirmation and relevant transaction details.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request containing necessary payment details

example.message: The payment request data is missing required fields or contains invalid values

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

example.message: The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or payment method decline

details.issue: Payment was declined by the issuer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment status updates via webhook
post.description: This endpoint accepts webhook notifications from payment gateways regarding updates to payment transactions. The payload should include the transaction identifier and the updated status. On processing, the system updates payment records accordingly.

requestBody.description: Webhook notification payload for payment status updates

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields

402.description: Payment status update declined or requires action

example.message: The payment status update was rejected due to validation errors
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog by accepting product details in the request body. Upon success, returns the created product data.

requestBody.description: Product object that needs to be added to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 20 hours battery life.

200.description: Successfully created the product and returned its details.

400.description: Invalid product data provided in the request.

example.message: One or more fields in the product data are invalid.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: A product with the same identifier or unique attribute already exists.

example.message: A product with the given name or SKU already exists.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred in the server while processing the request.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping and tracking information for the specified order identified by orderId.

200.description: Returned the tracking information for the order.

404.description: The requested order or tracking information was not found.

example.message: No tracking information found for the given orderId.

500.description: An unexpected internal server error occurred while processing the request.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing the required user information in the request body. Returns the user's details upon successful registration.

requestBody.description: Representation of the new user's data to be created

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete
A user with the given email already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code of the item's price (e.g., USD, EUR).

discount.description: Discount amount applied on the item.

price.description: Original price of a single item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently present in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable by the user after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices of all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the entire cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied on the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this item.

price.description: Original price of a single unit of product.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for this product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Amount payable for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending).

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped).

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

currency.description: Currency code in which payment is requested.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being paid.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway used.

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was processed.

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with the payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to process the payment.

status.description: Status of the payment (e.g., completed, failed).

transactionId.description: Identifier provided by the payment gateway for tracking.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response message from the payment gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment as notified by webhook.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

description.example: A high-quality wireless headset with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the shipment

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last tracking update

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, customer)

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user information was last updated

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, customer)

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

path.description: API endpoint path where the error occurred

status.description: HTTP status code of the error
